resultList.dtldesc: Discover refined urban living in the thriving residential hub of Kokapet, Hyderabad, with this spacious 3 BHK apartment in the premium Jaswitha Luxor community. Designed to offer comfort, functionality, and a contemporary lifestyle, this ready-to-move residence is ideal for families seeking a well-connected home in one of Hyderabads fastest-growing neighbourhoods. Spread across a super built-up area of 2130 sq-ft, the apartment combines generous interiors with excellent ventilation and natural light, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout the day. Situated on the 3rd floor of a well-maintained 9-storey tower, the apartment features three spacious bedrooms, three bathrooms, and three balconies that provide pleasant society views and refreshing airflow. The thoughtfully planned living and dining area offers ample space for both relaxation and entertaining guests. The home also includes a dedicated puja room, adding convenience for families looking for a spiritually harmonious living environment. The apartment is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to customise the interiors according to their personal style and preferences. The kitchen is designed in a practical layout with provision for a normal kitchen setup and efficient utility usage. Premium vitrified tile flooring enhances the elegance of the interiors while ensuring durability and easy maintenance. The property is Vaastu compliant and west facing, making it suitable for buyers who value traditional design principles along with modern comforts. Jaswitha Luxor is a RERA-approved residential development offering a secure and family-friendly environment with modern lifestyle amenities. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply, 100 percent power backup support, CCTV surveillance, professional security services, and four lifts for smooth accessibility within the tower. The project also includes childrens play areas and other modern community features that support comfortable everyday living. One covered parking space is allocated with the apartment, ensuring convenience and vehicle safety.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover contemporary living with this spacious 3 BHK apartment available for sale in Tellapur, Hyderabad. Located in a rapidly developing residential neighbourhood, this brand-new property combines comfort, functionality and long-term value, making it an excellent choice for families seeking a modern lifestyle with excellent future appreciation potential.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 8th floor, this unfurnished apartment offers a thoughtfully planned layout designed for practical and comfortable living. As a brand-new residence without any existing furniture or woodwork, the property provides complete flexibility for buyers to customise interiors according to their personal preferences.The apartment comprises three spacious bedrooms and three bathrooms, with all bathrooms attached to the respective bedrooms. The floor plan has been modified to provide attached washrooms for enhanced comfort and privacy.One of the major highlights of the apartment is the foyer space at the entrance, which creates a premium feel while ensuring added privacy instead of opening directly into the living area. The spacious living room and bedrooms allow good natural light and ventilation throughout the home.The property features one sit-out balcony attached to the dining area, creating a pleasant extension of the living space.The kitchen area has been kept open without woodwork, allowing buyers complete freedom to design it according to their preferences. Vitrified tile flooring is used throughout the apartment, adding durability and a modern appearance. The property is Vaastu compliant and enjoys a West-facing orientation.FacilitiesThe apartment includes one covered parking space. Power backup for lights and fans is available to ensure convenience during power interruptions.Residents benefit from security arrangements and CCTV surveillance. Lifestyle amenities include a swimming pool, gymnasium, multifunctional hall, crche and indoor games facilities.LocalitySituated in Tellapur, Hyderabad, the property is surrounded by established residential communities and enjoys excellent connectivity. The ORR exit is approximately 8 minutes away, allowing convenient access to Gachibowli, Financial District and other major destinations.Reputed educational institutions including Manthan School, Glendale International School, Meru International School and Kidzee are nearby. Citizen Speciality Hospital, Aparna Hospitals, Aparna Neo Mall, supermarkets and daily conveniences are also easily accessible, making this location highly suitable for family living.
